note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Burn to Left upper arm / Measures 5.5 cm x 4.0 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 5.5 cm x 4.0 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 42% slough, 58% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
